commands.review_summary:
The PR adds compaction-model alias lookup inside `resolveEmbeddedCompactionTarget` and tests same-provider, cross-provider, and unmatched alias behavior.

PR surface: Source +46, Tests +77. Total +123 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main returns a bare compaction override literally, and the related issue supplies a concrete `Unknown model: openai/gpt54mini` log for that path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for the shared-resolver change and corrected real behavior proof; no repair lane is queued because the external PR still needs contributor-side proof.

target.title: fix(agent): resolve compaction model alias to canonical model ref
target.author: huangting-xy
